spec.description: Access control metrics dashboard.

spec.title: Total Grant Exchange Requests
spec.description: Total number of grant exchange backchannel requests to configured OpenID providers.

spec.title: Authenticated Requests
spec.description: Rate of requests (per second) that were successfully authenticated and matched an Access Control policy.

spec.title: Grant Exchange Error Rate
spec.description: Percentage of failed grant exchange backchannel requests to configured OpenID providers.

spec.expr:
round(sum (increase(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="grant_exchange",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`,result!='success'}[$__range])))/
round(sum (increase(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="grant_exchange",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range])))

spec.title: Grant Exchange Request Errors
spec.description: Failed grant exchange requests per second by error type.

spec.title: Top 5 Access Control Policies by Request Count
spec.description: The top 5 Access Control policies with the most grant exchange requests.

spec.title: Top 5 Access Control Policies by Error Count
spec.description: The top 5 Access Control policies with the most faulty grant exchange requests.

spec.expr: round(sum by (policy) (increase(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="grant_exchange", result!="success", managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range])))

spec.title: Total Token Refresh Requests
spec.description: Total number of token refresh backchannel requests to configured OpenID providers.

spec.title: Token Refresh Error Rate
spec.description: Percentage of failed token refresh backchannel requests to configured OpenID providers.

spec.expr:
round(sum (increase(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="token_refresh",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`,result!='success'}[$__range])))/
round(sum (increase(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="token_refresh",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range])))

spec.title: Total Token Refresh Requests
spec.description: Total token refresh requests per second along with the error rate.

spec.expr:
sum (rate(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="token_refresh",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`, result!="success"}[1m]))/
sum (rate(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="token_refresh",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[1m]))

spec.title: Token Refresh Request Errors
spec.description: Failed token refresh requests per second by error type.

spec.title: Top 5 Access Control Policies by Error Count
spec.description: The top 5 Access Control policies with the most faulty token refresh requests.

spec.expr: round(sum by (policy) (increase(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="token_refresh", result!="success", managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range])))

spec.title: Top 5 Access Control Policies by Request Count
spec.description: The top 5 Access Control policies with the most token refresh requests.

spec.title: Total Token Introspection Requests
spec.description: Total number of token introspection backchannel requests to configured OpenID providers.

spec.description: Percentage of failed token introspection backchannel requests to configured OpenID providers

spec.expr:

round(sum (increase(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="introspection",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range])))

spec.title: Total Token Introspection Requests
spec.description: Total token introspection requests per second along with the error rate.

spec.expr:
sum (rate(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="introspection",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`, result!="success"}[1m]))/
sum (rate(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="introspection",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[1m]))

spec.title: Token Introspection Request Errors
spec.description: Failed token introspection requests per second by error type.

spec.title: Top 5 Access Control Policies by Request Count
spec.description: The top 5 Access Control policies with the most token introspection requests.

spec.title: Top 5 Access Control Policies by Error Count
spec.description: The top 5 Access Control policies with the most faulty token introspection requests.

spec.expr: round(sum by (policy) (increase(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="introspection", result!="success", managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range])))

spec.title: Total Token Exchange Requests
spec.description: Total number of token exchange backchannel requests to configured OpenID providers.

spec.title: Token Exchange Error Rate
spec.description: Percentage of failed token exchange backchannel requests to configured OpenID providers.

spec.expr:
round(sum (increase(microgateway_token_exchanges_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`,result!='success'}[$__range])))/
round(sum (increase(microgateway_token_exchanges_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range])))

spec.title: Total Token Exchange Requests
spec.description: Total token exchange requests per second along with the error rate.

spec.expr:
sum (rate(microgateway_token_exchanges_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`, result!="success"}[1m]))/
sum (rate(microgateway_token_exchanges_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[1m]))

spec.title: Token Exchange Request Errors
spec.description: Failed token exchange requests per second by error type.

spec.title: Top 5 Access Control Policies by Error Count
spec.description: The top 5 Access Control policies with the most faulty token exchange requests.

spec.title: Top 5 Access Control Policies by Request Count
spec.description: The top 5 Access Control policies with the most token exchange requests.

spec.title: Requests by Authentication Method
spec.description: Rate of requests (per second) by authentication method that were successfully authenticated and matched an Access Control policy.

spec.title: Non Authorized Request by Authentication Method
spec.description: Rate of requests (per second) by authentication method that were successfully authenticated, matched an Access Control policy, but were not authorized by the matching policy.

spec.title: Non Authorized Request Rate
spec.description: Rate of authenticated requests that could not be authorized by the matching Access Control policy.

spec.expr:
round(sum (increase(microgateway_authenticated_requests_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`, authorized="false"}[$__range])))/
round(sum (increase(microgateway_authenticated_requests_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range])))

spec.title: Total Authenticated Requests
spec.description: Total number of requests that were successfully authenticated and matched an Access Control policy.

spec.title: OIDC: Authenticated Requests
spec.description: Total number of requests authenticated by OpenID Connect.

spec.title: JWT: Authenticated Requests
spec.description: Total number of requests authenticated by JWT.

spec.title: Certificate: Authenticated Requests
spec.description: Total number of requests authenticated by client certificates.

spec.title: Top 5 Access Control Policies
spec.description: The top 5 Access Control policies by number of matching authenticated requests.

spec.title: Total Grant Exchange Requests
spec.description: Total grant exchange requests per second along with the error rate.

spec.expr:
sum (rate(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="grant_exchange",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`, result!="success"}[1m]))/
sum (rate(microgateway_oidc_backchannel_requests_total{request="grant_exchange",managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${backend_service:regex}`}[1m]))

spec.title: Airlock Microgateway Access Control - Metrics

spec.name: operator
spec.label: Microgateway Operator
spec.description: Allows filtering on the managing operator instance.

spec.name: namespace
spec.label: Gateway Namespace
spec.description: Allows filtering on the namespaces in which gateways are deployed.

spec.name: gateway_name
spec.label: Gateway Name
spec.description: Allows filtering on specific gateway instance names within the selected namespaces.

spec.name: route
spec.label: Route
spec.description: Allows filtering request metrics of the selected Gateway instances on the name of their matching route.
